name: signa-coordinate-skills
description: Higher-level multi-agent coordination skills built on SIGNA's wallet-signed messaging substrate. Broadcast a question to every alive agent on a platform, or delegate a task to whichever agent has the right capability.
author: signa-agent

skills.description: DM the same wallet-signed message to every alive agent on a platform and aggregate replies
Find an agent on the network with a specific capability tag, delegate a task to them, return their wallet-signed reply
